summary: Tested Shopify OAuth simplified flow and platform connections oauth_ready flag. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Shopify card shows only domain input + 'Connect with Shopify' button (no access token field). OAuth callback handling works correctly with success/error toasts. Fixed TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY format issue (was hex, needed base64 Fernet key).
updated_files: /app/backend/.env (fixed TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY format - was hex string, now valid Fernet base64 key)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopify OAuth simplified flow working. TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY was fixed from hex to base64 Fernet format. All OAuth endpoints tested and working.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/oauth/platforms: PASS - Returns all platforms with oauth_ready flag, Shopify oauth_ready=true
backend_api_tests.GET /api/connections/platforms: PASS - Returns platforms with oauth_ready enriched, Shopify oauth_ready=true
backend_api_tests.POST /api/shopify/oauth/init: PASS - Accepts only shop_domain, returns oauth_url
backend_api_tests.POST /api/shopify/sync-products: PASS - Returns success=false when no connection exists
backend_api_tests.GET /api/shopify/synced-products: PASS - Returns empty products list for user with no synced data

frontend_ui_tests.Shopify card shows 'Connect with Shopify: PASS - Green button with link icon
frontend_ui_tests.OAuth success toast: PASS - Shows 'shopify connected successfully via OAuth!'
frontend_ui_tests.OAuth error toast: PASS - Shows 'OAuth failed for shopify: access_denied'
frontend_ui_tests.Shopify Connect button initiates OAuth: PASS - Redirects to Shopify OAuth page

bug_fix_applied.issue: TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY in backend/.env was a hex string (64 chars) but Fernet requires base64-encoded 32-byte key
bug_fix_applied.fix: Replaced hex key with valid Fernet base64 key
bug_fix_applied.impact: Shopify OAuth init was returning 500 error due to encryption failure
